codex_command: Read AGENTS.md in this directory and follow it exactly. Read the repo before writing. Produce exactly three files under artifacts/: request_path_brief.md, path_map.json, and docs_correction.md. In request_path_brief.md, explicitly say whether the support note is correct. In path_map.json, use the exact top-level key schema_version with value cnb55.request_path_map.v1. Do not modify any file outside artifacts/.
